title: Miscanthidium flavescens
taxonomy: Miscanthidium flavescens is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Panicoideae and tribe Andropogoneae. The genus Miscanthidium is closely related to Miscanthus and is often considered a synonym of Miscanthus by some taxonomists. However, Miscanthidium is a distinct genus that is primarily found in Africa. More research is needed to fully understand the classification of Miscanthidium flavescens.
